title: galium hirtiflorum
intro: Galium hirtiflorum, also known as the hairy-fruited bedstraw, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium hirtiflorum include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Galium hirtiflorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
